TOP AGENTS/FRAMEWORKS: (1) LangGraph (langchain-ai/langgraph, MIT, ~22k stars) — stateful multi-agent, HITL checkpoints, LangSmith observability, best for complex enterprise workflows. (4) Microsoft Agent Framework MAF (microsoft/agent-framework, MIT, ~8k stars, v1.0 GA 2026) — enterprise successor to Semantic Kernel, combines AutoGen + SK. (5) Dify (langgenius/dify, Apache-2.0, ~144k stars) — production agentic platform, 1M+ apps, visual builder. (6) Semantic Kernel (microsoft/semantic-kernel, MIT, ~28k stars) — C#/Python/Java AI SDK, now superseded by MAF. (7) n8n (n8n-io/n8n, Apache-2.0, ~45k stars) — workflow automation 400+ integrations, AI-native nodes, self-hosted compliance. (9) Temporal (temporalio/temporal, MIT, ~13k stars) — durable execution for long-running agentic workflows. (10) Prefect (prefecthq/prefect, Apache-2.0, ~18k stars) — Python workflow orchestration, lowest barrier for AI workflows. (11) Pydantic AI (pydantic/pydantic-ai, MIT, ~12k stars) — type-safe agents, structured outputs. (12) Google ADK (google/adk-python, Apache-2.0, ~9k stars) — Google 2026 OSS agent framework.
